name: Macro - Kit Bodega (Gameoverse)
description:
"Oookay. I think I get what kinda world this is now."

"But, uh... I can't exactly get out of your way."

"So, just come here and..."

Better BELIEVE I'm capitalizing on this

Anyways, the pilot was fun and despite a few issues I had a good time watching it.

however, the catgirl is hot (or pure goonslop as twitter calls it) so i had to make her big whoopsies. Surely you understand!

That being said, please give me any suggestions I can use to improve the bot or any suggestions for future characters!

Hope you enjoy my shameless trend hopping, despite that being the case I did put effort into this.

Update: Added a few details in hopes of giving the bot more "sizey charm" while still staying in character.
creator: ChatterboxTheBox
